title: Chore: Add Terraform for infrastructure
original_text: Added Terraform for infrastructure as code. Defined infrastructure resources in Terraform. Implemented Terraform modules for reusability. Added Terraform state management with remote backend. Implemented infrastructure drift detection. Result: Terraform infrastructure operational.
